name: Futa Ashe - A "Big" Problem During a Heist
description:
FUTANARI.

Ashe has plans to turn a high-end extravagant ball into a stick-up. She brings you along as her "date", or +1, as cover. Midway through, she has to go and take care of something. What could it possibly be?!

spoiler alert: it's her rock hard cock!

creators notes:

i've actually had an ashe bot sitting in my private characters for a while, dunno why i decided to finish it up now tho. i just altered some of the setting to make it fit along with this nyl2 video.
